$comment: Canonical attack chains seeded from community knowledge. Cross-reference against arcanatime + recharge values in data/canonical/powers/*. Add chains as you capture them from forum threads; record provenance in source_capture.
$schema_doc: Each entry: archetype + primary + powers (in chain order) + required_global_recharge (% global rech needed for gapless 3-chain at +95% slotted rech) + source_capture (path under community/ once captured).

examples.name: Tanker SuperStrength 3-chain (KB-included)
examples.notes: Tight chain. Requires perma-Hasten (+167%) + Spiritual Alpha (+33%) + ~50% from sets to fit Knockout Blow's 25-sec base recharge into a 5.4-sec cycle. Easier alternative: drop KB from chain, fire on cooldown.

examples.name: Brute Foot Stomp on cooldown (AoE filler)
examples.notes: 20-sec base recharge → ~6.7sec at +200% global. Use as the AoE 'tick'; fill with Punch/Haymaker single-target between fires. Force Feedback +Recharge proc in Foot Stomp adds +100% rech proc on KD targets — synergistic.

examples.name: Stalker Energy Melee AS-cycle (procmonster)
examples.notes: Procmonster build: AS slotted with 4-5 damage procs, perma-Hasten avoided to preserve PPM chance. Build Up + AS critical = ~600+ dmg single hit. Total Focus on cooldown also proc-loaded.

examples.name: Blaster Fire/Atomic 3-chain
examples.notes: Standard ranged 3-chain. Fire_Blast (T1) → Fire_Ball (T3 AoE) → Blaze (T8 heavy). Perma-Hasten + Aim/Build Up rotation. Inferno on cooldown for clears.

examples.name: Dominator Permadom rotation
examples.notes: Permadom requires +165% global rech (90sec dom recharge / 90sec duration). Domination always-up gives +25% Mez Mag + endurance refund. Heavy assault attack on cooldown.

examples.name: Sentinel Snipe-cycle (post-i24 fast snipes)
examples.notes: Aim or +22% ToHit converts Penetrating Ray to fast snipe (1.32 sec cast). Slot snipe with damage procs (Apocalypse, Sting of the Manticore). Cycle: ToHit buff → snipe → fillers → snipe.

examples.name: Brute Energy Melee Total Focus rotation
examples.notes: Total Focus (15sec base) on cooldown with 5 damage procs. Energy Punch + Bone Smasher fill. Brute Fury needs the rapid filler attacks to scale damage.
